name: Cauliflower, Broccoli & Bell Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small head cauliflower, cut into florets
1/2 large broccoli head, cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil the cauliflower and broccoli until tender.
2. Drain and cool the vegetables.
3. Combine with sliced bell peppers in a medium salad bowl.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together crushed garlic, tahini, water, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat.
6. Check seasonings and adjust if necessary.
7. Refrigerate covered until well chilled.
8. Serve on a platter garnished with fresh parsley and sesame pita wedges.
